function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the public web via self-hosted SearXNG. Returns titled results with URLs for citation. Use for current events, general research, and facts NOT covered by uploaded RAG documents. Prefer search_documents first when the user refers to uploaded PDFs/policies. If SearXNG is offline, the tool returns a clear error — then try wikipedia_lookup or arxiv_search.

function.name: wikipedia_lookup
function.description: Look up an encyclopedia summary on Wikipedia (free MediaWiki API). Prefer for established topics, definitions, biographies, and background. Returns extract + page URL to cite.

query.description: Topic or page title to look up

sentences.description: Approx. number of summary sentences (1-10, default 4)

function.name: arxiv_search
function.description: Search academic preprints on arXiv (free Atom API). Use for ML, physics, math, CS papers. Returns titles, authors, abstract snippets, and abs URLs to cite.

query.description: Paper topic, title keywords, or author+topic query
